history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a screenshot of a WhatsApp conversation. The conversation appears to be casual and uses informal Indonesian slang. There are multiple chat bubbles, some in green (sent messages) and some in dark gray (received messages). The background of the chat is a repeating pattern of the word "YOSHUSTR" in a stylized font. The conversation includes text messages and a voice message. There is no nudity, pornographic material, or any suggestive content visible in the image.
